reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the current README bounded eval loop claim covered by a checked-in fixture, adapter-owned evaluate fixture run, observed packet, summary packet, and evaluate observation replay.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names a concrete CLI loop and packet outputs, which can be proven by deterministic command execution and packet shape checks.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by a checked-in dev/repo fixture run through evaluate fixture producing eval-observed.json and eval-summary.json, plus evaluate observation reopening the observed packet into a summary packet.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep README bounded eval loop examples aligned with the adapter-owned evaluate fixture and evaluate observation command surfaces.
